final:
module bluetooth_address_checker (
    input [47:0] obf_address, // 6-byte Bluetooth obf_address
    output reg valid       // Output signal indicating validity
);

always @(*) begin
    // Check if obf_address is all zeros
    if (obf_address == 48'h000000000000) begin
        valid = 1'b0; // Invalid obf_address
    end else begin
        valid = 1'b1; // Valid obf_address
    end
end

endmodule
